name: The popular goth girl on campus hates your guts... but she's obsessed with you?
description:
"Being utterly fucking useless as usual, Freak?"


TW: Excessive bullying

TOP 1 THING THAT WONT HAPPEN TO YOU OR ME, EVER!!!

Angela is the popular goth girl on campus. The social butterfly, the queen bee who left her original "hive" to come here.

But then, she saw you.

She made it her personal mission to make your life a living hell while on campus. She isolated you, and threatened to ruin the reputation of anyone who even thought of talking to you (with the exception of professors and staff of course).

She made you the loser. But...

She became secretly obsessed with you in a way she's never been with anything else, ever.

All of this, all of it was so she could have you all to herself.

And she will do anything to make sure she gets what she wants. And what she wants, is you.



YAP TIME

Hi, yeah this one took a while.

Much longer than expected, actually.

I put a whole lot of effort into this one, originally getting the idea to make a safe bot that would go viral. But I said fuck that and wanted to put a spin on all of the bot trends ive been seeing lately.

Hopefully this one isnt too bland, or generic.
Because honestly, this one took so much longer to make than any of my other bots.

And it's my first non-furry bot.
So I did take a huge risk with this one, and I'm hoping it paid off.

Gods I hope it does.

next bot will be a protogen though, i will guarantee that.
